label: Sum option entry
description: A single entry in a ThingSetMaker_Sum options list. May be gated by a chance roll and market value bounds.

thingSetMaker.label: Thing set maker
thingSetMaker.description: The maker that runs for this sum entry. The Class attribute selects the concrete subclass.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability (0-1) that this entry runs during a sum generation pass. 1.0 means always.

maxMarketValue.label: Max market value
maxMarketValue.description: This entry is skipped if the accumulated total market value already exceeds this threshold.

minMarketValue.label: Min market value
minMarketValue.description: This entry is skipped if the accumulated total market value is below this threshold.

minTotalMarketValue.label: Min total market value
minTotalMarketValue.description: This entry is skipped unless the total market value target is at least this large.
